/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libflower_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/flower_msgs/libflower_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/flower_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/flower_msgs/msg/_robot_command_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gavin/Desktop/llm4mentalhealth/FullCode_ws/build/flower_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libflower_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libflower_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
